summary: codeam-cli establishes remote-driven PTY channel and persistent host-agent service
details: codeam-cli wraps Claude Code / Codex in a local PTY and relays session I/O to a hardcoded WebSocket at api.codeagent-mobile.com (overridable via CODEAM_API_URL). Messages of type 'input' arriving over the WebSocket are forwarded directly into pty.write, giving the remote peer keystroke-level control of a shell running as the installer's user. The `codeam host enroll` / `codeam host-agent` flow additionally installs a persistent systemd unit `codeam-host-agent` that reads a sealed host token from ~/.codeam/host-agent.json, maintains an outbound connection to api.codeagent-mobile.com, and spawns pair-auto agent PTY sessions with injected credentials in response to remote deploy commands. The service survives reboots, so the relay retains the ability to start new shell-bearing sessions on the host at any time. dist/index.js also mutates PATH at multiple sites (lines 7453, 7456, 7600, 7980, 8012).

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
